'''Zavval''' was the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] overlord of the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] refining operation on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], sibling of [[Aruk Besadii Aora]] and brother of [[Borga Besadii Diori]]. [[Teroenza]] reported directly to Zavval, who in turn reported directly to Aruk. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Bria Tharen]] escaped Ylesia, Zavval was killed by a collapsing ceiling. Outraged at his death, Aruk wasted no time in replacing him with his nephew [[Kibbick]], who turned out to be completely inept.
